name: Crab and Avocado Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno Chiles, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and finely chop the Jalapeno Chiles.
2. Mix all ingredients except lettuce and lime wedges in a bowl.
3. Place 1/4 cup of lettuce on the top of each serving dish.
4. Divide the crabmeat mixture among the dishes.
5. Garnish with lime wedges.
